description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a deep blue cover, featuring metallic silver corner accents and a prominent purple diamond-shaped gem or emblem in the center of the front. The cover appears sturdy and slightly stylized, with beveled edges and a subtle gradient in the blue coloration. The spine is also blue, with no visible text or ornamentation, and the pages are a light tan color, visible from the top and side views. The back cover is plain blue with matching silver corner details but lacks the central emblem. The book has a slightly cartoonish or stylized appearance, suggesting it could be a magical tome or a special edition volume. There are no visible clasps, locks, or other interactive hardware.
description: A thick, blue hardbound book with silver corner accents and a central purple gem on the front cover. The pages are tan, and the design is stylized and sturdy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue cover with silver corners and a central purple diamond-shaped gem.
description_view_1: Spine view reveals the blue spine and the tan pages, with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain blue cover with silver corners, lacking the central gem.
description_view_3: Opposite spine view shows the blue back edge and the top of the tan pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized, central purple diamond-shaped gem or emblem, surrounded by metallic silver corner accents. The design is simple and geometric, with no pictorial illustration or detailed artwork.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid blue with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. It is plain and unadorned.
